Please include:

- a priority suggestion (`P0`, `P1`, `P2`, or `P3`) using the rubric in [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](https://github.com/databendlabs/openraft/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#issue-triage);
- the affected version or branch;
- whether the issue blocks a release or upgrade; and
- whether a workaround exists.
